feedback.text: Student of the Jean Monnet Modules project “DERECHO”: ‘Defense of European Rights and Excellence for Consumers HHarmonisation’, No 101239437. Project financed by the European Union. Jean Monnet Actions in the field of Higher Education: Modules. Call for tenders ERASMUS-JMO-2025-HEI-TCH-RSCH. In an increasingly ‘digitalised’ society, the Digital Fairness Act is promoted with the aim of improving the protection of users in digital media. In my view, this legislation is essential because at a time when consumers are exposed to as many risks it is essential that they are protected from online difficulties such as cyberbullying or misleading advertising.
